newTests.name: Cart total is positive after adding items via CartFlow
Stored iPod products all have non-empty picture URLs
[SOFT] MacBook detail — heading, quantity, and cart button all checked
[HARD] Home header controls — stops at the first missing control
All MacBook search results have positive prices
[SOFT] Home header controls — all failures collected in one run
[SOFT] Search result prices — every failing product reported
Sort by Name Z-A produces results in descending order
MacBook reviews tab exposes the review form fields
Adding exactly one product results in one cart item
Submitting empty login credentials shows a danger warning
Stored iPod products all have non-empty descriptions
iPhone product detail page shows heading and add-to-cart button
Home nav leads to register page at the correct URL

flakyTests.name: Flaky test — fails once, passes on retry
Login error message is generic and does not reveal email existence
